mapper.insert: insert into model_connection_grants(connection_id, grant_type, grantee_user_id, created_at) values(#{connectionId}, #{grantType}, #{granteeUserId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, connection_id as connectionId, grant_type as grantType, grantee_user_id as granteeUserId, created_at as createdAt from model_connection_grants where connection_id=#{connectionId} order by id
select count(*) from users where id in #{userId} and system_role='USER' and status='ACTIVE'
select exists(select 1 from users where id=#{userId} and system_role='USER' and status='ACTIVE')

select exists( select 1 from model_connection_grants g join model_connections c on c.id=g.connection_id join users u on u.id=#{userId} and u.system_role='USER' and u.status='ACTIVE' where g.connection_id=#{connectionId} and c.owner_type='PLATFORM' and (g.grant_type='ALL_BUSINESS_USERS' or (g.grant_type='USER' and g.grantee_user_id=#{userId})) and c.status='ACTIVE' and c.deleted_at is null)
